title: Trump's plan to redesign every .gov website leads to AI-designed horrors
description: A year in, National Design Studio delays plan to update government web standards.
content:
President Donald Trump’s plan to “fill the digital potholes” and use AI to quickly redesign every government website isn’t going very well.
Last August, Trump created the National Design Studio, or NDS, by executive order. A temporary DOGE-like entity that answers only to the president, NDS was tasked with creating new standards to update the US Web Design System (USWDS) and overhaul 27,000 dot-gov websites in just three years. At the end of this so-called “America by Design” initiative, the government’s “design language” would supposedly be more usable and beautiful, Trump expected.
However, that monumental task—assigned to a small team under a short timeframe—was seemingly made harder by DOGE's deep cuts to agencies previously responsible for improving government websites, including dismantling the 18F technology unit and restructuring the US Digital Service into DOGE.Read full article

title: ঋণাত্মক চিন্তা পৰিহাৰ কৰি ইতিবাচক মনেৰে আগবাঢ়িব লাগিব ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীঃ ড° বোধেন শইকীয়া
description:
ডিজিটেল  সংবাদ,বেবেজীয়াঃ  নগাঁও জিলাৰ বেবেজীয়াৰ সমীপৰ ডিমৌ চাৰিআলিস্থিত ঐতিহ্যমণ্ডিত শালমৰা উচ্চ মাধ্যমিক বিদ্যালয়ত এক গাম্ভীৰ্যপূৰ্ণ পৰিৱেশত ধৰ্মানন্দ গোস্বামী আৰু কৃতী ছাত্ৰী প্ৰয়াত স্মৃতিৰেখা মেধি সোঁৱৰণী শৈক্ষিক বঁটা প্ৰদানৰ লগতে কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক এক সম্বৰ্ধনা জনোৱা হয়। অসম চৰকাৰৰ প্ৰাক্তন মীন মন্ত্ৰী উমেশ চন্দ্ৰ দাসৰ পৌৰোহিত্যত অনুষ্ঠিত এই বিশেষ সভাত মুখ্য অতিথি হিচাপে উপস্থিত থাকে কৰ্মশ্ৰী হিতেশ্বৰ শইকীয়া মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ তথা বিশিষ্ট নিৱন্ধকাৰ-স্তম্ভ লেখক ড° বোধেন শইকীয়া।

বিদ্যালয়ৰ প্ৰধান শিক্ষক মাধৱ চন্দ্ৰ দাসে উদ্দেশ্য ব্যাখ্যা আৰু আদৰণি ভাষণ আগবঢ়োৱা সভাখনি সুচাৰুৰূপে আঁত ধৰে জ্যেষ্ঠ শিক্ষক দিব্যজ্যোতি শৰ্মাই। লগতে সভাত ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উদ্দেশ্যি বক্তব্য প্ৰদান কৰি ড° বোধেন শইকীয়াই কয় যে, শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলে সদায় ঋণাত্মক চিন্তা পৰিহাৰ কৰি ইতিবাচক মনোভাৱেৰে জীৱন যাত্ৰাত আগবাঢ়ি যাব লাগিব। ইয়াৰ লগতে বৰ্তমানৰ ৰাজহুৱা শিক্ষা ব্যৱস্থাৰ স্খলনক লৈ তেওঁ তীব্ৰ ক্ষোভ প্ৰকাশ কৰে। 
ড° শইকীয়াই কয়, "আজিৰ তাৰিখত ৰাজহুৱা বা চৰকাৰী শিক্ষাৰ মানদণ্ড নিম্নগামী হোৱাৰ বাবে প্ৰথমতে আমি নিজে দায়ী। তাৰ পিছত জাতীয় জীৱনৰ ত্ৰাণকৰ্তা বুলি আত্মপ্ৰবঞ্চনা কৰি থকা দল-সংগঠনবোৰ আৰু আমাৰ চৰকাৰ দায়ী।"
আনফালে, এই অনুষ্ঠানতে চলিত বৰ্ষৰ হাইস্কুল শিক্ষান্ত পৰীক্ষাত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা বিদ্যালয়খনৰ কৃতী ছাত্ৰ বহ্নিমান ডেকাক ধৰ্মানন্দ গোস্বামী আৰু স্মৃতিৰেখা মেধি সোঁৱৰণী শৈক্ষিক বঁটা প্ৰদান কৰা হয়। এই বঁটাত ছাত্ৰগৰাকীক এখন সম্বৰ্ধনা পত্ৰ, গ্ৰন্থৰ টোপোলা আৰু নগদ ধন আগবঢ়োৱা হয়। ইয়াৰ উপৰি, চলিত বৰ্ষৰ মেট্ৰিক পৰীক্ষাত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা আন আন শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলৰ লগতে বিদ্যালয়খনৰ ষষ্ঠ শ্ৰেণীৰ পৰা দশম শ্ৰেণীলৈকে বাৰ্ষিক পৰীক্ষাসমূহত সৰ্বোচ্চ নম্বৰ প্ৰাপক ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলকো বিশেষভাৱে সম্বৰ্ধনা জ্ঞাপন কৰা হয়।

সভাত প্ৰাক্তন প্ৰধান শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী ইৰালতা মেধি আৰু প্ৰাক্তন প্ৰধান শিক্ষক খগেন মুক্তিয়াৰে ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উদ্দেশ্যি বহুমূলীয়া পৰামৰ্শমূলক ভাষণ আগবঢ়ায়। অনুষ্ঠানত অৱসৰপ্ৰাপ্ত শিক্ষক নিৰ্মল শইকীয়া, ললিত ডেকা, প্ৰবীণ ৰাজা, প্ৰদীপ চন্দ্ৰ দাস, জীতেন দাস, পৰমানন্দ হাজৰিকা, জ্যোতিপ্ৰসাদ ডেকা, পৰমানন্দ দাস, অৱসৰপ্ৰাপ্ত শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী ৰীতা হাজৰিকা, শালমৰা গাঁৱ পঞ্চায়তৰ প্ৰাক্তন সভানেত্ৰী ববিতা মেধিকে ধৰি বিদ্যালয়ৰ শিক্ষক-শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী, অভিভাৱক আৰু স্থানীয় ৰাইজ উপস্থিত থাকে।

title: McLaren reveal VERY different British GP livery
ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ…
description:
ଫକ୍ସବରୋ,୩୦ା୬: କ୍ରମାଗତ ତୃତୀୟଥର ପାଇଁ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଛି। ଏଥର ଦଳ ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପାରାଗୁଏଠାରୁ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ପରାଜୟ ବରଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଦେଶ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟର ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହି ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡକୁ ଉତ୍ତୀର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ଏହି ପରାଜୟକୁ ହଜମ କରିବା ଜର୍ମାନୀ ପାଇଁ ଅଧିକ କଷ୍ଟକର ହେଉଛି। ଏଥିଲାଗି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଖବରଦାତା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀର ଅଧିନାୟକ ଜୋଶୁଆ କିମିଚ ପୂରା ଦଳକୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ମ୍ୟାନେଜର […]
The post ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଫକ୍ସବରୋ,୩୦ା୬: କ୍ରମାଗତ ତୃତୀୟଥର ପାଇଁ ଜର୍ମାନୀ ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ର ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଛି। ଏଥର ଦଳ ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପାରାଗୁଏଠାରୁ ଲଜ୍ଜାଜନକ ପରାଜୟ ବରଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ଦେଶ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟର ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହି ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ରାଉଣ୍ଡକୁ ଉତ୍ତୀର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ଏହି ପରାଜୟକୁ ହଜମ କରିବା ଜର୍ମାନୀ ପାଇଁ ଅଧିକ କଷ୍ଟକର ହେଉଛି। ଏଥିଲାଗି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଖବରଦାତା ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଜର୍ମାନୀର ଅଧିନାୟକ ଜୋଶୁଆ କିମିଚ ପୂରା ଦଳକୁ ସମାଲୋଚନା କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ମ୍ୟାନେଜର ଜୁଲିଆନ ନାଗେଲ୍ସମାନଙ୍କୁ ବିଦା କରାଯିବ କି ପ୍ରଶ୍ନର ଉତ୍ତରରେ ଜୋଶୁଆ କହିଥିଲେ, ହଁ, ମୁଁ ତାହା ଆଶା କରୁଛି। କିନ୍ତୁ ଶେଷରେ ପିଚ୍‌ରେ ଖେଳୁଥିବା ଖେଳାଳିମାନେ ପରାଜୟ ପାଇଁ ଦାୟୀ। ଆମ ପାଖରେ ପାରାଗୁଏ ଭଳି ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱୀଙ୍କୁ ହରାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଆକାଂକ୍ଷା ଓ ଦକ୍ଷତା ରହିବା ଉଚିତ। ଆମକୁ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଜିତିବାର ଥିଲା।
ଏହାବାଦ୍‌ ଏକ୍ସଟ୍ରା ଟାଇମ୍‌ରେ ଭାର ଜରିଆରେ ଜୋନାଥନ ତା ଦେଇଥିବା ଗୋଲ୍‌କୁ ନାକଚ କରାଯିବା ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଜୋଶୁଆ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି, କେହି ବି ରେଫରି କିମ୍ବା ପେନାଲ୍ଟି ଶୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌କୁ ଦାୟୀ କରିବା କଥା ଚିନ୍ତା କରିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। ଯଦି ତୁମେ ୧୨୦ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଜିତିପାରୁ ନାହଁ, ତେବେ ତୁମେ ଟୁର୍ନାମେଣ୍ଟରୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ପଡ଼ିବା ଦରକାର।
The post ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେବା ପରେ ମୁହିଁ ଖୋଲିଲେ ଅଧିନାୟକ, କହିଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Why India is singing along again: The business case for jingles in the age of reels
description: From 'Vicks Ki Goli Lo' to viral remixes, India's most memorable advertising tunes are proving that good music can outlive campaigns and still drive business
content: "Vicks ki goli lo, khich khich door karo." The moment those words cross my mind, I instinctively hear the tune that accompanied them. Before I know it, another melody takes over. "Sabki pasand Nirma... Washing Powder Nirma." Then comes "Vicco Turmeric, nahi cosmetic..." and almost immediately, "Buland Bharat Ki Buland Tasveer... Hamara Bajaj." It is remarkable how these songs have survived decades without the help of streaming platforms or playlists. I may not remember the exact television programmes that aired alongside them, but I remember every note, every pause and every word of these advertisements. That is the extraordinary power of a great jingle. It slips into popular culture so naturally that it stops feeling like advertising altogether. It becomes part of everyday life, resurfacing in conversations, family gatherings, school competitions and even casual humming while doing household chores. Few marketing tools have managed to achieve this kind of longevity. Today, those familiar tunes are finding an entirely new audience. India's advertising classics are making an unexpected comeback, not on television but across Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and creator-led videos. The latest example is the revival of the iconic "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" jingle, which is now being interpreted by musicians across genres rather than being remade as a single polished commercial track. Electronic music producers, rappers, classical instrumentalists, beatboxers and percussion artists are giving the melody their own spin, allowing a song that first became popular decades ago to enter the playlists and feeds of Gen Z. It is a fascinating reminder that while advertising formats may evolve, memorable music rarely goes out of fashion. When advertising sounded like entertainment  To understand why jingles are suddenly back in the spotlight, it helps to remember what television looked like during the 1980s and 1990s. Indian households had far fewer entertainment choices. Families gathered around a single television set every evening, often watching the same channels together. Commercial breaks were not simply interruptions between programmes. They became part of the viewing experience. Children memorised advertisements almost as easily as nursery rhymes, while parents often found themselves unconsciously singing the same tunes during daily routines. Unlike today's fragmented media environment, where every individual watches different content on different devices, advertising back then enjoyed a rare collective audience. A successful commercial reached millions of viewers simultaneously, making it easier for brands to create shared cultural moments.           Advertising agencies understood that music could achieve what words alone could not. Instead of relying on lengthy product descriptions, they created simple melodies with repetitive lyrics and memorable hooks. Brand names were woven naturally into the songs, ensuring consumers could not separate the tune from the product. Long after the commercial ended, the melody continued to play inside people's heads. That translated into brand recall at supermarket shelves, neighbourhood stores and pharmacies, often influencing buying decisions without consumers even realising it. Before marketers spoke about emotional connections, sonic identities or consumer psychology, Indian jingles were already accomplishing all three. The soundtrack of an entire generation  Some advertising songs became so deeply embedded in Indian culture that they crossed the boundaries of marketing. "Washing Powder Nirma" did far more than promote a detergent. It became a song sung by children in school buses, performed during cultural programmes and repeated by families across the country. The commercial's dancing women dressed in spotless white saris became instantly recognisable symbols of the brand, but it was the melody that truly carried the campaign into popular memory. Decades later, many Indians can still sing every line without hesitation. The same happened with "Vicco Turmeric, nahi cosmetic...", which transformed a simple Ayurvedic skincare product into one of India's most recognisable advertising identities. The jingle survived multiple generations with remarkably little change because it consistently reinforced the product's positioning while remaining catchy enough to remember. Then there was "Buland Bharat Ki Buland Tasveer... Hamara Bajaj," perhaps one of the finest examples of advertising that sold an emotion rather than merely a product. Released during a period of economic optimism, the campaign celebrated aspiration, family values and national pride, allowing Bajaj to occupy an emotional space that extended well beyond scooters. Even healthcare brands mastered the art. The cheerful rhythm of "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" transformed a cough drop into one of India's most recognisable healthcare advertisements, demonstrating that even functional products could become part of everyday conversation through music. The 2000s shifted the focus away from music  The advertising landscape began changing rapidly after the turn of the century. Satellite television expanded dramatically, hundreds of channels competed for attention and audiences became increasingly fragmented. At the same time, celebrity endorsements grew more influential. Bollywood actors, cricketers and later social media personalities became the primary faces of campaigns. Advertisements became visually grander, production budgets increased and storytelling often took precedence over memorable melodies. International campaigns also influenced Indian marketing, leading several brands to adopt global creative templates that relied less on locally composed jingles. The arrival of smartphones and social media accelerated this transformation even further. Attention spans shrank as consumers began scrolling through endless streams of content. Brands focused on producing cinematic advertisements, influencer collaborations and visually striking campaigns designed to stop users mid-scroll. Music remained important, but traditional lyrical jingles gradually became less common. Instead, advertisers leaned towards background scores or licensed songs, believing that visual storytelling had become the dominant language of modern marketing. Yet even during this period, sound never completely lost its commercial value. Airtel's signature tune, composed by A.R. Rahman in 2002, demonstrated that a carefully crafted melody could become one of the strongest brand assets in the country. Unlike conventional jingles, it contained no lyrics, yet millions of Indians instantly associated those few notes with the telecom giant. It proved that while advertising styles had evolved, distinctive audio identities still possessed remarkable commercial power. Why social media has made jingles valuable again  Ironically, the platforms often blamed for shortening attention spans are now driving the return of sonic branding. Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and similar short-form video platforms are built around sound. Algorithms encourage users to discover trending audio clips, while creators constantly search for catchy music that audiences will instantly recognise. Unlike television commercials that ended after 30 seconds, social media audio has the potential to be reused thousands or even millions of times by ordinary users. Every dance routine, comedy sketch, cooking video or parody built around a recognisable tune extends the life of a brand's message far beyond its original campaign. This changes the economics of advertising in significant ways. Instead of repeatedly paying for expensive television placements, brands can create audio assets that consumers voluntarily adopt. A memorable sound becomes intellectual property that continues generating value every time it is used by creators. Rather than forcing advertisements into people's feeds, marketers increasingly hope audiences will incorporate their music naturally into their own content. In many ways, this is the digital equivalent of children singing jingles in school playgrounds during the 1990s, only now those playgrounds exist on social media and reach millions of viewers simultaneously.           The Vicks revival reflects a broader marketing shift  The recent resurgence of the "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" jingle reflects exactly this change in thinking. Instead of releasing one updated commercial, the brand has embraced multiple interpretations by artists across genres. Musicians including Nucleya and Kaam Bhaari, alongside independent performers working in classical, jazz, rock and electronic music, have recreated the familiar melody using instruments ranging from flutes and live drums to beatboxing and even everyday objects as percussion. The result feels less like a traditional advertising campaign and more like a cultural conversation where creators reinterpret a shared memory for contemporary audiences. What makes this approach particularly interesting is that it avoids forcing nostalgia. Rather than telling consumers to remember the past, it invites creators to make the tune their own. That distinction matters because younger audiences are generally resistant to overtly nostalgic marketing. They are far more likely to engage with content that feels authentic, entertaining and creator driven. By allowing the jingle to evolve organically across platforms, the campaign demonstrates how legacy brand assets can remain culturally relevant without appearing outdated. Nostalgia is becoming a measurable business strategy  For marketers, nostalgia is no longer just an emotional trigger. It has become a commercially valuable strategy supported by consumer behaviour. Millennials who grew up with these jingles now represent one of India's largest spending groups, while Generation Z enjoys discovering retro culture through remixes, memes and vintage aesthetics. A single advertising tune therefore manages to speak to two entirely different audiences. Older consumers experience familiarity and trust, while younger viewers encounter something that feels quirky, distinctive and worth sharing. Few marketing assets possess the ability to bridge such a wide generational gap. This is particularly important at a time when customer acquisition costs across digital platforms continue to rise. Brands are constantly searching for creative ideas that maximise organic reach rather than relying solely on paid promotion. A memorable piece of music that consumers willingly reuse offers exactly that opportunity. Every creator who adopts the sound effectively becomes an unpaid distributor, extending the campaign's reach without requiring additional media spending.         The future of branding may be heard before it is seen  For years, marketers believed visual branding was everything. Logos became simpler, colour palettes more distinctive and packaging increasingly minimal. Yet in an era where consumers scroll past hundreds of images every day, sound is quietly reclaiming its importance. A recognisable melody can stop someone mid-scroll, trigger an emotional memory within seconds and remain lodged in the mind long after the video ends. That kind of recall is difficult to achieve through visuals alone. The revival of "Vicks Ki Goli Lo, Khich Khich Door Karo" is therefore much bigger than the return of a nostalgic tune. It signals a renewed appreciation for sonic branding at a time when digital platforms reward audio as much as visuals. India's biggest brands are beginning to realise that while advertisements may disappear from timelines within hours, a great melody can survive for generations. The most successful jingles were never simply songs written to sell products. They became cultural shorthand, passed from one generation to another almost effortlessly. In an age dominated by algorithms, influencers and fleeting trends, that may be the most valuable marketing asset of all. A campaign can end. A hashtag can fade. But a great jingle has a habit of staying in your head, and on balance sheets, for decades.

title: SwaLay Digital: Where music distribution meets ownership
description: An Indian company has created a complete rights protection system, including audio fingerprinting, content security, and government copyright registration, within a single music distribution platform. No Indian or global distributor has tried this on a large scale.SwaLay Digital, an Indian music distribution company operated by TalantonCore Group, is positioning itself as one of the world's most complete rights protection platforms for independent artists. It combines music distribution with its own content security technology and India's first built-in copyright registration tool. The company distributes music to over 50 global and Indian streaming platforms, including Spotify, Apple Music, JioSaavn, and Amazon Music. For the last two years, it has focused on building a rights framework entirely in-house. This system goes far beyond what any Indian distributor, and most global ones, currently provide.At the heart of this infrastructure is My D.N.A™️ (Digital Notarization & Authentication), a tool launched this year. It allows artists to file an official Indian copyright application without leaving the SwaLay platform. The process results in a copyright registration that is recognized under India's Copyright Act and the Information Technology Act. Artists can check the status of their application in real time from their existing portal."Copyright protection and distribution are the easy parts now," said Nikhil Jain, founder of SwaLay Digital. "The real problem nobody was solving is what happens after the music is out, who monitors for theft, who protects the rights, and who helps the artist truly own what they created. We built the company around that question."In addition to copyright registration, SwaLay has integrated ACRCloud and Shazam's audio fingerprinting service into its platform. This enables real-time detection of unauthorized use of an artist's music online, even if the music has been pitch-shifted, sped up, or partially reproduced. Audio files on the platform are available only through time-limited presigned URLs, which block direct downloads or redistributions by third parties. Each release automatically creates a verified SmartLink page, serving as a permanent public record of ownership.The combination of these tools, all developed and maintained in-house instead of relying on third-party services, places SwaLay in a small group of platforms worldwide that view rights protection as an essential aspect of distribution, not just an optional feature.This launch comes at a crucial time for India's independent music market. The country produced over 130,000 new releases in 2024, within an industry valued at around ₹2,100 crore. Most of those artists lack formal copyright protection for their work. Historically, the government registration process has required physical paperwork, legal expertise, and weeks of processing time, which are often beyond the reach of working musicians."An artist should be able to distribute their music, market it, and register the copyright all in one click from home," Jain stated. "That workflow didn't exist in India before we created it." SwaLay plans to expand its public rollout later in 2026, with international growth of its system aimed at Southeast Asia and the South Asian diaspora market.For more information, please visit: https://swalay.com/The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: SC orders status quo on Karnataka HC direction to reopen ethanol allocation process
description: The Attorney General argued that enhancing the allocation of one supplier at this stage would trigger similar claims from other similarly placed suppliers, thereby disrupting the entire allocation process.

title: రైతుల ఖాతాల్లోకి ‘రైతు భరోసా’ నిధులు జమ
description: Rythu Bharosa : తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్రంలోని అన్నదాతలకు కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రభుత్వం భారీ ఊరటనిచ్చింది. రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా సాగు చేసుకునే రైతులకు పంట పెట్టుబడి సాయం అందించే లక్ష్యంతో ప్రవేశపెట్టిన...
content:
Rythu Bharosa : తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్రంలోని అన్నదాతలకు కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రభుత్వం భారీ ఊరటనిచ్చింది. రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా సాగు చేసుకునే రైతులకు పంట పెట్టుబడి సాయం అందించే లక్ష్యంతో ప్రవేశపెట్టిన ‘రైతు భరోసా’ నిధులను ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎనుముల రేవంత్ రెడ్డి అధికారికంగా విడుదల చేశారు. హైదరాబాద్‌లోని శిల్పకళావేదికలో అత్యంత వైభవంగా నిర్వహించిన “రైతు ఆశీర్వాద సభ” వేదికగా సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి కంప్యూటర్ బటన్ నొక్కి నేరుగా రైతుల బ్యాంక్ ఖాతాల్లోకి ఈ నిధులను జమ చేశారు. ఈ పథకం కింద అర్హులైన రైతులకు ఎకరానికి రూ.6,000 చొప్పున ఆర్థిక సహాయం అందుతుంది. వానాకాలం సాగు పనులు ప్రారంభమయ్యే కీలక సమయంలో పెట్టుబడి సాయం నేరుగా ఖాతాల్లో పడటంతో అన్నదాతల్లో హర్షాతిరేకాలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నాయి.



Read Also : గోషామహల్ ఎమ్మెల్యే రాజాసింగ్‌కు నాంపల్లి ప్రత్యేక కోర్టులో బిగ్ రిలీఫ్



Rythu Bharosa Funds Release June 30,  Rythu Sabha







దశల వారీగా రూ.9వేల కోట్లు – తొలి విడతలో 41 లక్షల మందికి లబ్ధి



ఈ విడత నిధుల పంపిణీని ప్రభుత్వం అత్యంత క్రమబద్ధంగా, పారదర్శకంగా నిర్వహిస్తోంది. అందులో భాగంగా మొదటి విడతలో భాగంగా రెండు ఎకరాల వరకు సాగు భూమి కలిగిన చిన్న, సన్నకారు రైతులకు ప్రాధాన్యతనిచ్చారు. ఈ మొదటి విడత ద్వారా రాష్ట్రంలోని 41.37 లక్షల మంది రైతుల ఖాతాల్లో రూ.2,482 కోట్ల నిధులు జమ కానున్నాయి. మొత్తం మీద రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా కోటిన్నర ఎకరాల సాగు భూమి కలిగిన 73.32 లక్షల మంది రైతులకు ఈ పథకాన్ని వర్తింపజేయాలని ప్రభుత్వం లక్ష్యంగా పెట్టుకుంది. ఇందుకోసం కేటాయించిన మొత్తం రూ.9,000 కోట్ల నిధులను రాబోయే రోజుల్లో దశల వారీగా (వివిధ ఎకరాల పరిమితిని బట్టి) పూర్తిస్థాయిలో విడుదల చేయనున్నట్లు ప్రభుత్వం స్పష్టం చేసింది.

title: Bosco Martis admitted to hospital after chest discomfort
description: Bollywood choreographer and entrepreneur Bosco Leslie Martis has been admitted to Mumbai's Breach Candy Hospital after complaining of chest congestion and discomfort. title: మోడీ వచ్చి మోరీ క్లీన్ చేస్తారా ? – రేవంత్ ఘాటు విమర్శలు
description: CM Revanth : తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎనుముల రేవంత్ రెడ్డి రాష్ట్ర భారతీయ జనతా పార్టీ (బీజేపీ) నాయకులపై తనదైన శైలిలో ఘాటు విమర్శలు గుప్పించారు. స్థానిక...
content:
CM Revanth : తెలంగాణ ముఖ్యమంత్రి ఎనుముల రేవంత్ రెడ్డి రాష్ట్ర భారతీయ జనతా పార్టీ (బీజేపీ) నాయకులపై తనదైన శైలిలో ఘాటు విమర్శలు గుప్పించారు. స్థానిక సంస్థల నుండి ఏ ఎన్నికలు వచ్చినా రాష్ట్ర బీజేపీ నేతలు ప్రతి చిన్న విషయానికి ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోదీ పేరును జపించడాన్ని ఆయన తీవ్రంగా తప్పుపట్టారు. “వార్డు మెంబర్, కౌన్సిలర్, సర్పంచ్.. ఇలా ఏ ఎన్నికలైనా సరే మోదీ పేరే చెబుతున్నారు; రేపు మోదీ వచ్చి ఇక్కడి మోరీ (డ్రైనేజీ) క్లీన్ చేస్తారా?” అంటూ రేవంత్ రెడ్డి వ్యంగ్యాస్త్రాలు సంధించారు. స్థానిక సమస్యలను పరిష్కరించే నాయకులను చూపించి ఓట్లు అడగాలి తప్ప, ప్రతిదానికి ఢిల్లీ వైపు చూడటం ఏంటని ఆయన ప్రశ్నించారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ఆయన వాడిన లోకల్ సామెతలు మరియు సెటైర్లు ఇప్పుడు రాజకీయ వర్గాల్లో తీవ్ర చర్చనీయాంశంగా మారాయి.

పెళ్లికొడుకును చూడకుండా పిల్లను ఇస్తారా?: తెలంగాణ రాజకీయంపై రేవంత్ సెటైర్లు



ఎన్నికల వ్యూహాలను పెళ్లి సంబంధాలతో పోలుస్తూ సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డి ఆసక్తికరమైన వ్యాఖ్యలు చేశారు. “పెళ్లి పెద్దను చూసి అమ్మాయిని ఇస్తామా? పెళ్లికొడుకును కదా చూసేది!” అంటూ స్థానిక అభ్యర్థుల బలాన్ని పక్కనబెట్టి కేవలం జాతీయ నాయకత్వాన్ని నమ్ముకోవడంపై మండిపడ్డారు. ‘నబీనో, నబోనో’ ఎవరో వచ్చి ఇక్కడ అధికారం సాధిస్తామంటే కుదరదని, తెలంగాణ గడ్డపై తమ కాంగ్రెస్ సైన్యం గట్టిగా నిలబడుతుందని ధీమా వ్యక్తం చేశారు. పశ్చిమ బెంగాల్ లాంటి రాష్ట్రాల్లోనే బీజేపీ ఉనికి చాటుకోవడానికి 15 ఏళ్లు పట్టిందని గుర్తు చేస్తూ, తెలంగాణలో కాంగ్రెస్ నాయకులు క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో గట్టి పోటీ ఇస్తారని, ఇక్కడ బీజేపీ పప్పులు ఉడకవని రేవంత్ రెడ్డి స్పష్టం చేశారు.

title: বৰক'লাত শ্বহীদ চন্দন সিং-শিক্ষাবিদ তগৰ শৰ্মা সোঁৱৰণী বঁটা প্ৰদান অনুষ্ঠান সম্পন্ন
description:
ডিজিটেল  সংবাদ,বেবেজীয়াঃ  নগাঁও জিলাৰ অন্যতম অগ্ৰণী শিক্ষানুষ্ঠান বৰক'লা উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিক বিদ্যালয়ত এক গাম্ভীৰ্যপূৰ্ণ পৰিৱেশত "শ্বহীদ চন্দন সিং সোঁৱৰণী বঁটা" আৰু "শিক্ষাবিদ তগৰ শৰ্মা সোঁৱৰণী বঁটা" প্ৰদান অনুষ্ঠান সফলতাৰে সম্পন্ন হৈ যায়। বিদ্যালয়খনৰ প্ৰেক্ষাগৃহত আয়োজিত এই বঁটা প্ৰদান সভাত সভাপতিত্ব কৰে বৰক'লা উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিক বিদ্যালয়ৰ অধ্যক্ষ প্ৰতাপ সিঙে।
অনুষ্ঠানৰ আৰম্ভণিতে উপস্থিত অতিথি তথা ৰাইজক উদ্দেশ্যি আদৰণি ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰে বিদ্যালয়ৰ জ্যেষ্ঠ শিক্ষক ভদ্ৰকান্ত ডেকাই।  এই সভাখন আঁত ধৰে শিক্ষয়িত্ৰী নিহাৰিকা বৰা আৰু ইলাৰাণী দেৱীয়ে।

 আনফালে, বঁটা প্ৰদান সভাত বিশিষ্ট অতিথি হিচাপে অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰে বিদ্যালয়খনৰ প্ৰাক্তন অধ্যক্ষ গুৰুমুখ সিঙে। তেওঁ ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উদ্দেশ্যি এক প্ৰেৰণাদায়ক ভাষণ প্ৰদান কৰি কয় যে- বৰ্তমান সময় হৈছে প্ৰতিযোগিতাৰ সময়। এই যুগত নিজক প্ৰতিষ্ঠা কৰিবলৈ আৰু সফলতা লাভ কৰিবলৈ হ’লে শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকলে কঠোৰ পৰিশ্ৰম কৰাৰ লগতে গভীৰ অধ্যয়নত ব্ৰতী হ’ব লাগিব।
ইপিনে সভাত আন এগৰাকী প্ৰাক্তন অধ্যক্ষ গোবিন চন্দ্ৰ শৰ্মা, প্ৰাক্তন উপাধ্যক্ষ মায়া তালুকদাৰ, বিশিষ্ট নাগৰিক ব্ৰজেন বৰা, অৰ্জুন সিং, তেজা সিং, মঞ্জুলা লস্কৰ, মোহিনী মোহন লস্কৰ, বীৰেন নাথ, নন্দেশ্বৰ ডেকাৰজা, নানা সিং আৰু অসম জাতীয়তাবাদী যুৱ ছাত্ৰ পৰিষদৰ নেতা দেৱাশীষ দাসকে প্ৰমুখ্যে কৰি অঞ্চলটোৰ বহু গণ্য-মান্য ব্যক্তি উপস্থিত থাকে। এই অনুষ্ঠানতে চলিত বৰ্ষৰ পৰীক্ষাসূমহত দেখুওৱা উৎকৃষ্ট প্ৰদৰ্শনৰ বাবে ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলক উৎসাহিত কৰা হয়। লগতে চলিত বৰ্ষৰ উচ্চ মাধ্যমিক আৰু উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিক চূড়ান্ত পৰীক্ষাত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ হোৱা অঞ্চলটোৰ মুঠ ২৯ গৰাকী কৃতি শিক্ষাৰ্থীক এই বঁটা প্ৰদান কৰে।
মূল বঁটা প্ৰদান সভাৰ পূৰ্বে, বিদ্যালয়ৰ প্ৰেক্ষাগৃহত এক বাৰেৰহনীয়া সাংস্কৃতিক অনুষ্ঠান অনুষ্ঠিত হৈ যায়। এই সাংস্কৃতিক অনুষ্ঠানত স্থানীয় ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীসকলে বিভিন্ন জনগোষ্ঠীয় নৃত্য-গীত প্ৰদৰ্শন কৰাৰ লগতে আমন্ত্ৰিত কেইবাগৰাকীও শিল্পীয়ে গীত পৰিৱেশন কৰি উপস্থিত শিক্ষক, ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰী আৰু স্থানীয় ৰাইজক মন্ত্ৰমুগ্ধ কৰে।

title: ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀଙ୍କ ଅବସର ପରେ ସୁଶାନ୍ତ ନେଲେ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ
description:
ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର,୩୦।୬(ବାବୁଲା ପ୍ରଧାନ): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ସାବିତ୍ରୀ ମହିଳା ମହାବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଡ. ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀ ପଣ୍ଡା ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ଚାକିରିରୁ ଅବସର ନେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ନୂତନ ଭାରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ଡ.ସୁଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ମଲ୍ଲିକ ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ ଡ. ପଣ୍ଡାଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ପରେ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ମଲ୍ଲିକ ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ବିଧାୟକ ପ୍ରଦ୍ୟୁମ୍ନ କୁମାର ନାୟକଙ୍କୁ ଭେଟି କଲେଜର ଉନ୍ନତି ପାଇଁ ସହଯୋଗ କାମନା କରିଥିଲେ। ବିଧାୟକ ନାୟକ କଲେଜର ଉନ୍ନତି ପାଇଁ ସବୁ ପ୍ରକାର ସହଯୋଗ ଯୋଗାଇ […]
The post ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀଙ୍କ ଅବସର ପରେ ସୁଶାନ୍ତ ନେଲେ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର,୩୦।୬(ବାବୁଲା ପ୍ରଧାନ): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ସାବିତ୍ରୀ ମହିଳା ମହାବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଡ. ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀ ପଣ୍ଡା ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ଚାକିରିରୁ ଅବସର ନେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ନୂତନ ଭାରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ଡ.ସୁଶାନ୍ତ କୁମାର ମଲ୍ଲିକ ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ ଡ. ପଣ୍ଡାଙ୍କଠାରୁ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ପରେ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ମଲ୍ଲିକ ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ବିଧାୟକ ପ୍ରଦ୍ୟୁମ୍ନ କୁମାର ନାୟକଙ୍କୁ ଭେଟି କଲେଜର ଉନ୍ନତି ପାଇଁ ସହଯୋଗ କାମନା କରିଥିଲେ। ବିଧାୟକ ନାୟକ କଲେଜର ଉନ୍ନତି ପାଇଁ ସବୁ ପ୍ରକାର ସହଯୋଗ ଯୋଗାଇ ଦିଆଯିବ ବୋଲି ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଦେଇଥିଲେ।  ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ଉନ୍ନୟନ ପରିଷଦ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ନୀଳମାଧବ ପାତ୍ର, ଭାଜପା ନେତା ଧୋବା ଗୌଡ, ମାନସ ଜେନା ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
ସୂଚନା ଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଡ. ମଲ୍ଲିକ ଗତବର୍ଷ ସେପ୍ଟେମ୍ବର ମାସ ପୂର୍ବରୁ କିଛି ବର୍ଷ ଭାରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱରେ ଥିଲେ। ଏହାପରେ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସେଠାକୁ ଆସିକା ମହାବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟରୁ ଡ .ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀ ପଣ୍ଡାଙ୍କୁ ଭାରପ୍ରାପ୍ତ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଭାବେ ବଦଳି ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଡ.ପଣ୍ତା ଅବସର ନେବାପରେ ସୁଶାନ୍ତ ପୁଣି ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ନେଇଛନ୍ତି।
The post ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ସ୍ମିତାରାଣୀଙ୍କ ଅବସର ପରେ ସୁଶାନ୍ତ ନେଲେ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Trade Data: India's May services exports cross $31 bn, imports at $18.4 bn | Details
description: Trade Data: This marks a healthy 13.2 per cent increase compared to USD 32.46 billion in May 2025. Services imports for the month stood at USD 19.06 billion, up 14.1 per cent from USD 16.70 billion a year ago.
content: Trade Data: India’s services exports continued to show robust growth in May 2026, reaching an estimated USD 36.76 billion, according to official trade data released on Tuesday. This marks a healthy 13.2 per cent increase compared to USD 32.46 billion in May 2025. Services imports for the month stood at USD 19.06 billion, up 14.1 per cent from USD 16.70 billion a year ago.The services trade surplus for May came in at approximately USD 17.7 billion.This is a developing story...

title: ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ କେବେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ମିଳିବା ଦରକାର ଦରମା? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ କହୁଛି ସରକାରୀ ନିୟମ
description:
ନିଜର ଗୁଜୁରାଣ ମେଣ୍ଟାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଲୋକମାନେ ଭିନ୍ନ ଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରକାରର କାମ କରିଥାନ୍ତି। କେହି ନିଜର ବ୍ୟବସାୟ କରନ୍ତି ତ କେହି ଚାକିରି କରନ୍ତି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସରକାରୀ ଏବଂ ଘରୋଇ (ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ୍) ଦୁଇ ପ୍ରକାରର ଚାକିରି ସାମିଲ ରହିଛି। ଯଦିଓ ଏହା ଆମେ ସମସ୍ତେ ଜାଣୁ ଯେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ଘରୋଇ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ କାମ କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଅନେକ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଦରମା  ମଧ୍ୟ ବହୁତ ବିଳମ୍ବରେ ମିଳିଥାଏ। ଏଭଳି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ, ଘରୋଇ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ ଦରମା […]
The post ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ କେବେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ମିଳିବା ଦରକାର ଦରମା? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ କହୁଛି ସରକାରୀ ନିୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ନିଜର ଗୁଜୁରାଣ ମେଣ୍ଟାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଲୋକମାନେ ଭିନ୍ନ ଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରକାରର କାମ କରିଥାନ୍ତି। କେହି ନିଜର ବ୍ୟବସାୟ କରନ୍ତି ତ କେହି ଚାକିରି କରନ୍ତି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ସରକାରୀ ଏବଂ ଘରୋଇ (ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ୍) ଦୁଇ ପ୍ରକାରର ଚାକିରି ସାମିଲ ରହିଛି।
ଯଦିଓ ଏହା ଆମେ ସମସ୍ତେ ଜାଣୁ ଯେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ଘରୋଇ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ କାମ କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଅନେକ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଦରମା  ମଧ୍ୟ ବହୁତ ବିଳମ୍ବରେ ମିଳିଥାଏ। ଏଭଳି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ, ଘରୋଇ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ ଦରମା ମିଳିବାକୁ ନେଇ ସରକାରୀ ନିୟମ କଣ କହୁଛି, ତାହା ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଜାଣିବା ଜରୁରୀ ହୋଇଯାଏ। ଚାଲନ୍ତୁ ଜାଣିବା ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ଘରୋଇ କମ୍ପାନୀଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ କେବେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ଦରମା ମିଳିଯିବା ଉଚିତ…
ଭାରତୀୟ ଶ୍ରମ ଆଇନ ପେମେଣ୍ଟ ଅଫ୍ ୱେଜେସ୍ ଆକ୍ଟ (Payment of Wages Act) ଏବଂ ସାମ୍ପ୍ରତିକ ଶ୍ରମ ସଂହିତା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଘରୋଇ ସେକ୍ଟରରେ କାମ କରୁଥିବା ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଦରମା ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ୭ ତାରିଖ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ଆସିଯିବା ଉଚିତ।
ଯଦିଓ ଏଥିରେ କିଛି ଅନ୍ୟ ନିୟମ ମଧ୍ୟ ଯୋଡ଼ି ହୋଇଥାଏ, ଯେମିତି କି; କର୍ମଚାରୀଙ୍କ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ହିସାବରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଦରମାର ତାରିଖ ନିର୍ଭର କରିଥାଏ।


ଯେଉଁ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ ୧୦୦୦ ରୁ କମ୍ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଅଛନ୍ତି: ଏଭଳି କମ୍ପାନୀଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ୭ ତାରିଖ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ଦରମା ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିଥାଏ।


ଏକ ମାସ କାମ କରିବା ପରେ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ମାସର ୭ ତାରିଖ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ଦରମା ଦେବାର ନିୟମ ରହିଛି।


କିଛି କମ୍ପାନୀ ଏଭଳି ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଛି ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ସର୍ବାଧିକ ୧୦ ତାରିଖ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ଦରମା ଦେବା ପାଇଁ ସମୟ ମିଳିଥାଏ।


କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହା କେବଳ ସେହି ବଡ଼ କମ୍ପାନୀଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ହୋଇପାରିବ ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ୧୦୦୦ ରୁ ଅଧିକ କର୍ମଚାରୀ କାମ କରୁଛନ୍ତି।


ମନେକରନ୍ତୁ ଯଦି ଦରମା ମିଳିବା ଦିନ ଛୁଟି ଅଛି; ଯେମିତି କି ଯଦି ଦରମା ମିଳିବା ତାରିଖ ଦିନ ରବିବାର କିମ୍ବା କୌଣସି ସରକାରୀ ଛୁଟି  ପଡ଼ୁଛି, ତେବେ ଏଭଳି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ କମ୍ପାନୀକୁ ତା’ ପୂର୍ବ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟଦିବସ (ୱର୍କିଂ ଡେ) ରେ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ଦରମା ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ।

ଯଦି କୌଣସି କର୍ମଚାରୀ କମ୍ପାନୀରୁ ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା କୌଣସି କମ୍ପାନୀ କର୍ମଚାରୀଙ୍କୁ ଚାକିରିରୁ ବାହାର କରିଦେଇଛି ; ଏହି ଦୁଇଟିଯାକ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଚାକିରି ଛାଡ଼ିବାର ୨ଟି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟଦିବସ (Working Days) ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଫୁଲ୍ ଆଣ୍ଡ ଫାଇନାଲ୍ (Full & Final) ହିସାବ ହୋଇଯିବା ଉଚିତ।


The post ପ୍ରାଇଭେଟ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀରେ କେବେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ମିଳିବା ଦରକାର ଦରମା? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ କହୁଛି ସରକାରୀ ନିୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: IPO fundraising plunges 89% in June quarter as OFS issues rise
description: IPO fell to ₹3,777 crore, while OFS nearly doubled to ₹16,568 crore

title: ET Now Exclusive: Nomura's consumer playbook - Monsoon risks, rural recovery, ITC, Asian Paints and beverage outlook EXPLAINED by Mihir Shah | WATCH
description: Nomura's Mihir Shah expects India's consumer demand to stay resilient despite a below-normal monsoon, shares outlook on rural consumption, ITC, Asian Paints and identifies sectors poised to benefit or face headwinds.
content: India's consumer demand outlook remains resilient despite expectations of a below-normal monsoon, with mitigating factors likely to cushion the impact on rural consumption, according to Mihir Shah, Vice President and Research Analyst for India Consumers at Nomura. In an exclusive interview with ET Now, Shah also shared his outlook on ITC, Asian Paints and consumption trends, while highlighting key sectors expected to benefit and those likely to face near-term headwinds.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WEyuqYCbDLk&t=14sMonsoon and rural resilienceDespite a predicted below-normal monsoon, the impact is cushioned by reservoir levels, high government buffer stocks and improved irrigation infrastructure, said Shah.He said, "After seeing two consecutive years of above-normal monsoon, we are likely to see a below-normal monsoon this year. Secondly, it is expected to be an El Niño year, so there will be some impact from that as well. How concerned are we? Not overly. While there will be some challenges, we are not very concerned. This is largely because the El Niño, which is expected to result in weaker-than-normal monsoon conditions, is likely to remain in the weak-to-moderate range through June, July and August, and is expected to strengthen only in September, toward the end of the monsoon season.""At the same time, when you look at the Indian Ocean Dipole (IOD), it is currently in the neutral zone. If the IOD turns positive over the coming month or so, it could offset the impact of El Niño. So, while an El Niño is expected, there are certain mitigating factors that we will be watching, which could support rainfall despite expectations of a below-normal monsoon. This would also be the first below-normal monsoon after two consecutive years of above-normal rainfall. Reservoir levels are currently about 15 per cent above the 10-year average. In addition, the government's buffer stocks are around twice the normal level. There are also district-level mitigation measures being implemented by the government, which should support the rural economy.""So, while we may see weaker-than-expected kharif output, there are several mitigating factors in place, and we are not as concerned as one might otherwise expect," he said.Consumption trends While rural demand has moderated, it is still outpacing urban demand, though the gap is narrowing, said Shah, adding that staples face some pressure from low-to-mid single-digit price increases and inflationary trends."Rural demand has seen some moderation since the fourth quarter, while urban demand, on the other hand, has shown an initial pickup. As a result, the gap between rural and urban demand has been narrowing. Although rural demand continues to outpace urban demand, we expect this gap to keep narrowing. At the same time, if you look at many staple categories, several companies have implemented low- to mid-single-digit price hikes. Combined with the likelihood of weaker kharif output and a gradual rise in inflation, this could put some pressure on rural demand," said Shah, adding, "that said, while the improving trajectory in rural demand may pause, we expect it to remain largely range-bound rather than deteriorate significantly."ITCTalking about ITC, Shah said, "at the beginning of the new financial year, we saw a sharp increase of more than 40 per cent in taxes. This came after several years with no tax hike, making it both a significant and unexpected move. Following the increase, the company passed on around 25-30 per cent through price hikes. This is expected to impact volumes, and we have pencilled in a high single-digit volume decline for the quarter.""More importantly, margins are also likely to come under pressure because the tax increase is higher than the price hikes the company has been able to implement. As a result, we expect earnings before interest and tax (EBIT) from the cigarette business to decline by around 20 per cent," he said, adding, "while this is a sharp decline and is already reflected in the stock price, we believe the worst could largely be over after the first quarter. The high single-digit volume decline and around 20 per cent decline in EBIT are expected to moderate from the first quarter onwards.""However, on a two-year CAGR basis, we continue to expect flat earnings growth for ITC, and therefore maintain a reduced rating on the stock," Shah added.Asian PaintsAsian Paints remains a top pick for Shah. He said, "We had an anti-consensus buy call on Asian Paints and upgraded the stock two quarters ago. It performed well initially, then faced some headwinds, but rallied more than 30 per cent in the last quarter. Overall, the call has played out well. As far as our investment thesis is concerned, we do not believe the recent volume growth was a one-off. We expect high single-digit to low double-digit volume growth to continue this quarter as well as over the coming quarters.""More importantly, Asian Paints is benefiting from a favourable base. Last year, above-normal monsoons affected the number of painting days. This year, with El Niño conditions expected, there could be more painting days available for the industry. In addition, last year saw some disruption due to elections, including labour availability issues, which are unlikely to recur this year. The company has also announced a sharp price increase of around 13-14 per cent this quarter. However, because of the timing of these hikes, we expect the effective price increase to be closer to 7 per cent during the quarter, with the full 13-14 per cent pricing benefit likely to flow through in the next quarter.""On margins, commodity costs remained relatively soft in January and February, and companies typically carry two to three months of inventory. As a result, we do not expect significant margin pressure in the first quarter -- only a modest impact. While most of the cost inflation is likely to be reflected in the second quarter, companies have already implemented sharp price increases to mitigate those pressures. Therefore, the margin impact in the second quarter should also remain relatively limited," Shah said, adding, "overall, we expect strong growth to continue with limited margin pressure. Combined with easing competitive intensity and the potential for a valuation re-rating, we believe Asian Paints can continue to perform well and remains one of our top stock picks."BeveragesTalking about the beverages sector, Shah said, "as far as categories are concerned, each company has exposure to multiple segments, so there are both positives and negatives within individual businesses. While one may prefer companies with greater exposure to summer-centric categories, we believe it is better to adopt a bottom-up stock selection approach rather than focus solely on categories.""Categories such as soft drinks, carbonated beverages, ice creams and cooling hair oils are expected to perform better. At the same time, there could be headwinds for tea and certain quick-service restaurant (QSR) businesses. Overall, there are both positive and negative factors at play, which are likely to offset each other to some extent," he added.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money-related decisions.)

title: এফালে বান,আনফালে খৰাংঃ হাওৰাঘাটত কৃষকৰ হাহাকাৰ
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, হাওৰাঘাটঃ বৃহত্তৰ হাওৰাঘাট আৰু বকলীয়াঘাট অঞ্চলৰ কৃষকসকলে আহাৰ মাহ শেষ হ'বৰ সময়তো কঠিয়া সিঁচিব পৰা নাই। এই বৃহত্তৰ অঞ্চলটোৰ পথাৰত জলসিঞ্চনৰ ব্যৱস্থা নথকাৰ বাবেই আকাশলৈ চাই দিন কটাব লগা হৈছে কৃষকে। যদিহে সময়ত বৰষুণ নিদিয়ে তেন্তে হাওৰাঘাট আৰু বকলীয়াঘাট বৃহত্তৰ অঞ্চলৰ শ শ বিঘা খেতিপথাৰ চন পৰি ৰব। কৃষিকৰ্মৰ ওপৰতে নিৰ্ভৰশীল হাওৰাঘাট আৰু বকলীয়াঘাট অঞ্চলৰ কৃষকসকলৰ মাজত সম্প্ৰতি পানীৰ বাবে হাহাকাৰ অৱস্থাৰ সৃষ্টি হৈছে। 
 হাওৰাঘাট অঞ্চলটোৰ গৰখীয়া পুখুৰী, দক্ষিণ দীঘলীপাৰ, কচু পুখুৰী, শান্তিপুৰ, হাওৰাঘাট তিনি আলি, গড়জগা, পশ্চিম চূণপোৰা, মাজগাওঁ, কাংকি ইংতি, বেলগুৰি, বৰবিল, চামগুৰি, হিদিবংলং, মিৰিবালি, পলকামাটি, দুৰ্গাপুৰ, অনগাওঁ, আমনি, পদুম পুখুৰী, ৰংকুট, উত্তৰ বৰবিল আদি খৰাঙৰ কবলত। একে অৱস্থাৰ সৃষ্টি হৈছে ডেনগাওঁ, ডকমকা, পাৰখোৱা, নমাটি অঞ্চল আৰু হোজাই জিলাৰ কাকি অঞ্চলত।
কাৰ্বি আংলং জিলা স্বায়ত্তশাসিত পৰিষদ অথবা অসম চৰকাৰে অচিৰেই যদি খৰাং পীড়িত অঞ্চল সমূহৰ কৃষকসকলৰ সমস্যাসমূহ গুৰুত্বসহকাৰে গ্ৰহণ কৰিবলৈ আহ্বান জনাইছে ৰাইজে। অচিৰেই অঞ্চল সমূহ পৰিদৰ্শন কৰি খৰাং পীড়িত ঘোষণা কৰি তাৎক্ষণিকভাৱে বৰিং মেচিন বহুৱাই কঠিয়া ৰোপণৰ ব্যৱস্থা নকৰে তেন্তে ভুক্তভোগী কৃষকসকলৰ ভৱিষ্যত অন্ধকাৰ হৈ পৰিব।
উল্লেখ্য যে, হাওৰাঘাট আৰু বকলীয়াঘাট অঞ্চলৰ কিছু সংখ্যক কৃষকসকলে ব্যক্তিগত পুখুৰীৰ পানীৰ সহায়ত পানী মেচিনৰ জৰিয়তে কঠিয়া সিঁচিবলৈ সক্ষম হৈছে যদিও খৰাঙৰ কবলত পৰি সেয়াও পানীৰ অভাৱত নষ্ট হোৱাৰ উপক্ৰম হৈছে । ২০০৯ চনত অসম চৰকাৰে ৰাজ্যখনৰ ২৭ জিলাকে কৃষি ক্ষেত্ৰৰ খৰাংপীড়িত অঞ্চল হিচাপে ঘোষণা কৰিছিল। ঠিক একেদৰে ২০১৫ চনতো হাওৰাঘাট আৰু বকলীয়াঘাটৰ বৃহত্তৰ অঞ্চলৰ শ শ বিঘা খেতিপথাৰ খৰাঙৰ কবলত পৰিছিল। চৰকাৰে খৰাংপীড়িত অঞ্চল হিচাপে ঘোষণা কৰাৰ পিছত খৰাঙৰ কবলত পৰা ভুক্তভোগী কৃষকসকলৰ বাবে উপযুক্ত ক্ষতিপূৰণ আৰু সাহায্য প্ৰদান কৰা উচিত বুলি মন্তব্য কৰিছে অঞ্চলটোৰ ৰাইজে।
উল্লেখযোগ্য যে, বহু বছৰ আগতেই কাৰকক বে' গাঁৱত ক্ষুদ্ৰ জলসিঞ্চন প্ৰকল্পৰ মূল বান্ধটো স্থাপন কৰা হৈছিল। এই অতি পুৰণি জলসিঞ্চন প্ৰকল্পৰ মূল বান্ধটোৰ পৰা কিছু নিলগত থকা গাওঁসমূহত যেনে দক্ষিণ দীঘলীপাৰ, গৰখীয়া পুখুৰী, কাংকি ইংতি আদি গাঁৱৰ খেতিপথাৰত পানীৰ যোগানৰ বাবে নিজাববীয়াকৈ গৰখীয়া পুখুৰী আৰু দক্ষিণ দীঘলীপাৰ গাঁৱৰ ৰাইজৰ প্ৰচেষ্টাত নলা খান্দি পানী বোৱাই অনাৰ ব্যৱস্থা কৰা হৈছিল। কিন্তু অতি পৰিতাপৰ বিষয় যে এই অঞ্চলৰ কৃষকসকলে কাৰকক বে' গাঁৱত থকা ক্ষুদ্ৰ জলসিঞ্চন মূল বান্ধটোৰ পৰা দক্ষিণ দীঘলীপাৰ আৰু গৰখীয়া পুখুৰী গাঁৱৰ খেতিপথাৰলৈ পানী বোৱাই আনিবৰ বাবে ৰাইজে নিজেই ব্যৱস্থা কৰি লোৱা কেঁচা নলাটো পকীকৰণ কৰিবলৈ বিভাগীয় কৰ্তৃপক্ষক সংবাদ মাধ্যমৰ যোগেদি বাৰংবাৰ অনুৰোধ জনাই অহাৰ পিছতো কৃষকসকলৰ কথা চৰকাৰে গুৰুত্বসহকাৰে নোলোৱা বাবে আৰু কোনো ধৰণৰ কাণসাৰ নিদিয়া  বাবে আজিকোপতি বছৰ বছৰ ধৰি এনেদৰেই কৃষকসকলে হাহাকাৰ কৰি থাকিব লগীয়া হৈছে ।
কাৰকক বে' গাঁৱত অৱস্থিত ক্ষুদ্ৰ জলসিঞ্চন প্ৰকল্পৰ মূল বান্ধটোৰ পৰা দক্ষিণ দীঘলীপাৰ আৰু গৰখীয়া পুখুৰী গাঁৱৰ খেতিপথাৰলৈ পানী বোৱাই আনিবলৈ ৰাইজে সমূহীয়াকৈ নিজেই ব্যৱস্থা কৰি লোৱা কেঁচা নলাটো পকীকৰণ কৰিবলৈ কাৰ্বি আংলং জিলা স্বায়ত্তশাসিত পৰিষদৰ মুখ্য কাৰ্যবাহী সদস্য ড° তুলিৰাম ৰংহাং আৰু অসমৰ মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰী ড° হিমন্ত বিশ্ব শৰ্মাক অনুৰোধ জানাইছে কৃষকসকলে।

title: Batwoman actor Ruby Rose hospitalised after pool accident, suffers multiple broken ribs
description: Batwoman star Ruby Rose has been hospitalised after breaking multiple ribs in a pool accident at home. The actor shared CCTV footage of the fall, recalled past Batwoman stunt injuries, and revealed the painful recovery is expected to take weeks.
content: A quiet day at home turned into an unexpected trip to hospital for actor Ruby Rose. Best known for leading Batwoman and appearing in several action films, Rose revealed that a simple walk around the garden ended in a painful accident that left multiple ribs broken. Rather than keeping the incident private, the actor chose to share the dramatic moment with fans through home surveillance footage on social media, adding humour to what was clearly a frightening experience. While the video quickly caught attention online, it also reminded fans of Rose's long history of enduring serious physical injuries, both on and off film sets. From dangerous stunt-related accidents to this latest mishap at home, Rose's resilience has once again become a talking point. How did Ruby Rose end up in hospital? The accident took place on Monday while Ruby Rose was walking beside the swimming pool in the garden, holding a hose. Surveillance footage shared on Instagram Stories captured the entire sequence. The grainy clip shows Rose losing footing on the pool's edge before crashing into a nearby wall and the side of the pool. Moments later, the actor falls straight into the water. Adding a touch of irony, the video was paired with the classic track There She Goes by The La's. Sharing the clip, Rose joked about the painful consequences of the fall. "RIP to my ribs, and to the rest of my summer. They are broken, multiple," the actor wrote, before adding another light-hearted reference: "Straight to hospital, did not pass go or collect 200 dollars." What did Ruby Rose say after the accident? Before posting the surveillance footage, Rose had already updated followers on Instagram Threads about the injury. "One second I'm here talking to you. Next I'm in the hospital with two broken ribs. What a bloody Monday," the actor wrote, describing how quickly an ordinary day had spiralled into a medical emergency. Later, Rose admitted the recovery would not be easy. "I've just broken two ribs, falling into my own pool backwards, and you couldn't pay me to put a bra on, let alone stand up. Send good book and show recommendations. This is going to take many weeks," the actor shared on Threads. The candid updates struck a chord with fans, many of whom flooded social media with messages wishing Rose a speedy recovery. Why did this injury remind fans of Rose's Batwoman days? For long-time followers, this was not the first time Ruby Rose had spoken openly about painful injuries. While filming Batwoman in 2019, the actor suffered two herniated discs during a stunt. According to E! News, the accident came dangerously close to severing Rose's spinal cord, leading to emergency surgery. Reflecting on the latest accident, Rose compared it with that earlier ordeal and revealed that during the Batwoman shoot, returning to work happened remarkably quickly. The actor recalled being back on set just a day after breaking a rib and injuring the neck. Rose also revealed being inside the iconic batsuit despite struggling to feel both arms and legs because of the spinal injury. What happened after Ruby Rose left Batwoman? Ruby Rose played the title role in Batwoman before exiting the series in 2020. After leaving the show, the actor publicly alleged that executives associated with The CW series had created a hostile and unsafe workplace. Among the claims was an allegation that Rose had been pressured to return to filming just 10 days after undergoing surgery for injuries sustained during production. According to USA Today, Warner Bros., the parent company of The CW, denied the allegations made by Rose. The controversy attracted widespread media attention at the time and sparked discussions about safety standards for actors performing physically demanding roles. Where else have audiences seen Ruby Rose? Although Batwoman remains one of the actor's most recognised performances, Ruby Rose has built a career across television and major Hollywood productions. Audiences may also remember Rose from: Orange Is the New BlackResident Evil: The Final ChapterThe MegxXx: Return of Xander CageMany of these projects involved physically demanding action sequences, with Rose becoming known for performing several stunts personally. Did you know? One lesser-known fact about Ruby Rose is that the actor has frequently spoken about choosing to perform challenging action scenes instead of relying entirely on stunt doubles. While that commitment has helped shape an action-star image, it has also resulted in several serious injuries over the years, making the latest pool accident another painful chapter in a career already marked by remarkable resilience. For now, Rose appears to be focusing on recovery, books, television recommendations and healing after what was supposed to be an ordinary day at home. Judging by the actor's own updates, however, the sense of humour remains very much intact despite a summer that has unexpectedly begun in a hospital ward.

title: ବରଗଡ଼ କେନାଲରେ ଆସିବ ପାଣି, ଏହି ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତରେ ଖୋଲିବ ଗେଟ…
description:
ବରଗଡ଼,୩୦।୬(ପ୍ରେମାନନ୍ଦ ଖମାରୀ): ବରଗଡ଼ ମୁଖ୍ୟ କେନାଲକୁ ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ୨ତାରିଖ ସକାଳ ୯ଟାରୁ ପାଣି ଛଡାଯିବ । ଏହାକୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ରଖି ଏହି କେନାଲ ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭରଶୀଳ ଚାଷୀମାନେ ଖରିଫ ଚାଷକାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତି ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବାକୁ ବରଗଡ଼ ଜଳସେଚନ ବିଭାଜନ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷଣ ଯନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ବରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲାରେ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଜୁନ ମାସ ୧୫ ତାରିଖରୁ ଖରିଫ ଚାଷ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥାଏ । କିନ୍ତୁ କେନାଲ ପାଣି ଆସି ନ ଥିବା ଯୋଗୁଁ ଚାଷକାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ […]
The post ବରଗଡ଼ କେନାଲରେ ଆସିବ ପାଣି, ଏହି ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତରେ ଖୋଲିବ ଗେଟ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ବରଗଡ଼,୩୦।୬(ପ୍ରେମାନନ୍ଦ ଖମାରୀ): ବରଗଡ଼ ମୁଖ୍ୟ କେନାଲକୁ ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ୨ତାରିଖ ସକାଳ ୯ଟାରୁ ପାଣି ଛଡାଯିବ । ଏହାକୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ରଖି ଏହି କେନାଲ ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭରଶୀଳ ଚାଷୀମାନେ ଖରିଫ ଚାଷକାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତି ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବାକୁ ବରଗଡ଼ ଜଳସେଚନ ବିଭାଜନ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷଣ ଯନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି।
ବରଗଡ଼ ଜିଲାରେ ସାଧାରଣତଃ ଜୁନ ମାସ ୧୫ ତାରିଖରୁ ଖରିଫ ଚାଷ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥାଏ । କିନ୍ତୁ କେନାଲ ପାଣି ଆସି ନ ଥିବା ଯୋଗୁଁ ଚାଷକାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇଛି । ତେବେ ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ୨ତାରିଖ କେନାଲ ପାଣି ଛଡାଯିବ ବୋଲି ସୂଚନା ପାଇବା ପରେ ଚାଷୀମାନଙ୍କୁ କିଛି ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିଛି।
The post ବରଗଡ଼ କେନାଲରେ ଆସିବ ପାଣି, ଏହି ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତରେ ଖୋଲିବ ଗେଟ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

సమంతకు జీవితాంతం ఆ నరకం తప్పదా? డైరెక్టర్ కామెంట్స్ వైరల్ !!
description: Samantha : ప్రముఖ నటి సమంత రూత్ ప్రభు ఆరోగ్య పరిస్థితిపై టాలీవుడ్ డైరెక్టర్ నందినీ రెడ్డి ఇటీవల ఒక ఇంటర్వ్యూలో చేసిన వ్యాఖ్యలు సామాజిక మాధ్యమాల్లో...
content:
Samantha : ప్రముఖ నటి సమంత రూత్ ప్రభు ఆరోగ్య పరిస్థితిపై టాలీవుడ్ డైరెక్టర్ నందినీ రెడ్డి ఇటీవల ఒక ఇంటర్వ్యూలో చేసిన వ్యాఖ్యలు సామాజిక మాధ్యమాల్లో తీవ్ర దుమారం రేపుతున్నాయి. సమంత గత రెండేళ్లుగా ‘మయోసైటిస్’ అనే తీవ్రమైన ఆటో ఇమ్యూన్ వ్యాధితో పోరాడుతున్న సంగతి తెలిసిందే. ఈ వ్యాధి నియంత్రణలో ఉండటం కోసం ఆమె ఎంతో నిష్టగా, ఉప్పు మరియు ఎటువంటి రుచులు లేని కఠినమైన ‘యాంటీ ఇన్ఫ్లమేటరీ డైట్’ (మంటను తగ్గించే ఆహార నియమాలు) పాటిస్తున్నట్లు నందినీ రెడ్డి పేర్కొన్నారు. వైద్యశాస్త్రం ప్రకారం ఈ ఆటో ఇమ్యూన్ కండిషన్‌కు శాశ్వత నివారణ (కూర్) లేదని, కేవలం వ్యాధి తీవ్రత పెరగకుండా అదుపులో ఉంచుకోవడానికి మాత్రమే ఇలాంటి కఠినమైన జీవనశైలిని నిత్యం అనుసరించాల్సి ఉంటుందని ఆమె వివరించారు.



Read Also : సమంత రికార్డుల వేట.. రూ.80 కోట్ల వసూళ్లతో దూసుకుపోతున్న ‘మా ఇంటి బంగారం’!



 







ఆందోళనలో అభిమానులు – జీవితాంతం ఈ నరకం తప్పదా?



ఈ వార్త బయటకు రావడంతో సమంత అభిమానులు తీవ్ర ఆందోళనకు గురవుతున్నారు. వెండితెరపై ఎంతో గ్లామరస్‌గా, ఉత్సాహంగా కనిపించే తమ అభిమాన నటి, నిజజీవితంలో అనుదినం ఇంతటి నరకాన్ని అనుభవిస్తోందా అని వారు ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. జీవితాంతం ఆమెకు ఈ ఆహార నియమాల బాధ తప్పదా అని సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా ఫ్యాన్స్ చర్చించుకుంటున్నారు. అయితే, సమంత కేవలం ఒక నటిగానే కాకుండా, తనకున్న ఆరోగ్య సమస్యను ధైర్యంగా ఎదుర్కొంటూ, ఫిట్‌నెస్‌పై అవగాహన కల్పిస్తూ ఎంతోమందికి స్ఫూర్తిగా నిలుస్తోంది. వ్యాధిని జయించే క్రమంలో ఆమె చూపిస్తున్న మనోధైర్యాన్ని పలువురు నెటిజన్లు అభినందిస్తున్నారు.

title: The US going 100% EV by 2040 would save more than 100k lives, study says
description: Much of it comes from heavy-duty trucks and buses that burn diesel.
content:
Although climate change is the primary motivation behind electric vehicle adoption, it isn't the only consideration. Removing internal combustion engines from the road directly saves lives by reducing airborne pollutants that can cause and trigger asthma and other lung diseases.
Now, a report from the International Council on Clean Transportation has tried to quantify that effect, comparing various electrification scenarios over the next couple of decades. Currently, more than 41,800 premature deaths are attributable to air pollution from road transport, the ICCT says.
We've long known that living near a busy road is associated with worse health outcomes. Combustion products like nitrogen oxides (NOx), carbon monoxide (CO), particulates (PMs), and volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are all found around highways and busy intersections in concentrations high enough to cause health effects, and studies have repeatedly shown that living close to a major roadway is associated with increased mortality.Read full article

title: శాంసంగ్ గెలాక్సీ ఏ27 5జీ విడుదల..
description: Samsung Galaxy A27 5G: ప్రముఖ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్ బ్రాండ్ శాంసంగ్ (Samsung), ఇండియన్ మార్కెట్లో తన సరికొత్త మిడ్-రేంజ్ మొబైల్ గెలాక్సీ A27 5G (Galaxy A27...
content:
Samsung Galaxy A27 5G: ప్రముఖ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్ బ్రాండ్ శాంసంగ్ (Samsung), ఇండియన్ మార్కెట్లో తన సరికొత్త మిడ్-రేంజ్ మొబైల్ గెలాక్సీ A27 5G (Galaxy A27 5G) ని అఫీషియల్‌గా లాంచ్ చేసింది. పవర్‌ఫుల్ ఫీచర్లు, అదిరిపోయే లుక్స్‌తో పాటు దీర్ఘకాలిక సాఫ్ట్‌వేర్ సపోర్ట్‌తో వస్తున్న ఈ ఫోన్ సేల్స్ జూలై 3 నుంచి ప్రారంభం కానున్నాయి. ముఖ్యంగా యువతను ఆకట్టుకునేలా 120Hz సూపర్ అమోలెడ్ డిస్‌ప్లే, స్నాప్‌డ్రాగన్ 6 జెన్ 3 ప్రొసెసర్ వంటి హై-ఎండ్ స్పెసిఫికేషన్లను ఇందులో చేర్చారు. గతంలో వచ్చిన గెలాక్సీ A26 5G కి అప్‌గ్రేడెడ్ వెర్షన్‌గా మెరుగైన పర్ఫార్మెన్స్, సరికొత్త ఏఐ (AI) ఫీచర్లతో ఈ కొత్త మోడల్‌ను పరిచయం చేశారు.







Read also: Gold Rate Today: తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల్లో నేటి బంగారం ధరలు ఇవే!



ధర, బ్యాంక్ ఆఫర్లు మరియు లభ్యత



శాంసంగ్ గెలాక్సీ A27 5G బేస్ వేరియంట్ (6GB RAM + 128GB స్టోరేజ్) ధరను కంపెనీ రూ.28,999 గా నిర్ణయించింది. అయితే, లాంచ్ ఆఫర్ కింద బ్యాంక్ లేదా యూపీఐ (UPI) క్యాష్‌బ్యాక్ ద్వారా కొనుగోలు చేసే వారికి రూ.3,000 తక్షణ డిస్కౌంట్ లభిస్తుంది. ఈ మోడల్ 8GB + 128GB, 8GB + 256GB వేరియంట్లలో కూడా లభించనుంది.



లైట్ గ్రీన్, లైట్ పింక్, బ్లాక్ కలర్ ఆప్షన్లలో లభించే ఈ ఫోన్‌ను శాంసంగ్ అఫీషియల్ వెబ్‌సైట్ (Samsung.com), రిటైల్ స్టోర్లతో పాటు ప్రముఖ ఈ-కామర్స్ ప్లాట్‌ఫామ్‌లలో కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు. సులభమైన ఫైనాన్స్ ఆప్షన్ల కోసం 15 నెలల నో-కాస్ట్ ఈఎంఐ (Zero Down-payment EMI)తో పాటు ఎంపిక చేసిన ఫైనాన్స్ సంస్థల ద్వారా 24 నెలల వరకు ఈఎంఐ ప్లాన్‌లను శాంసంగ్ అందిస్తోంది.



గెలాక్సీ A27 5G టాప్ స్పెసిఫికేషన్లు



Samsung Galaxy A27 5G: డిస్‌ప్లే & ప్రాసెసర్



ఈ స్మార్ట్‌ఫోన్‌లో 6.7 అంగుళాల ఫుల్ హెచ్‌డీ+ (FHD+) సూపర్ అమోలెడ్ ఇన్ఫినిటీ-ఓ స్క్రీన్‌ను అమర్చారు. 120Hz రిఫ్రెష్ రేట్ వల్ల గేమింగ్, స్క్రోలింగ్ ఎక్స్‌పీరియన్స్ చాలా స్మూత్‌గా ఉంటుంది. స్క్రీన్ ప్రొటెక్షన్ కోసం ఇందులో గొరిల్లా గ్లాస్ విక్టస్+ రక్షణ ఉంది. పర్ఫార్మెన్స్ విషయానికొస్తే.. ఇది 4nm స్నాప్‌డ్రాగన్ 6 జెన్ 3 (Snapdragon 6 Gen 3) చిప్‌సెట్‌తో రన్ అవుతుంది. దీనికి LPDDR5X ర్యామ్, UFS 3.1 స్టోరేజ్ టెక్నాలజీని జత చేయడం వల్ల మల్టీ టాస్కింగ్, ఏఐ యాప్స్ వేగంగా పనిచేస్తాయి.



OIS కెమెరా & ఏఐ (AI) ఫీచర్లు



ఫోన్ వెనుక భాగంలో ట్రిపుల్ కెమెరా సెటప్ ఉంది. ఇందులో ఆప్టికల్ ఇమేజ్ స్టెబిలైజేషన్ (OIS) సపోర్ట్ ఉన్న 50MP మెయిన్ కెమెరా, 5MP అల్ట్రావైడ్ లెన్స్, 2MP మ్యాక్రో కెమెరా ఉన్నాయి. సెల్ఫీల కోసం ముందు వైపు 12MP కెమెరా ఇచ్చారు. ప్రీమియం ఫోన్లలో ఉండే ‘సర్కిల్ టు సెర్చ్’ (Circle to Search), ‘వాయిస్ ట్రాన్స్‌క్రిప్షన్’, ‘ఆబ్జెక్ట్ ఎరేజర్’ వంటి క్రేజీ గెలాక్సీ ఏఐ (Galaxy AI) ఫీచర్లు ఇందులో లభించడం విశేషం.



బ్యాటరీ బ్యాకప్ & అదనపు ప్రయోజనాలు



ఈ ఫోన్ 5,000mAh భారీ బ్యాటరీ, 25W ఫాస్ట్ ఛార్జింగ్ సపోర్ట్‌తో వస్తోంది. అన్నింటికంటే ముఖ్యంగా ఈ ఫోన్‌కు ఏకంగా 6 సంవత్సరాల పాటు ఆండ్రాయిడ్ ఓఎస్ అప్‌గ్రేడ్స్ (One UI Updates), 6 ఏళ్ల సెక్యూరిటీ అప్‌డేట్స్ ఇస్తామని శాంసంగ్ స్పష్టం చేసింది. యూజర్ డేటా సెక్యూరిటీ కోసం శాంసంగ్ నాక్స్ (Knox), నాక్స్ వాల్ట్ వంటి బలమైన భద్రతా ఫీచర్లు ఇందులో ఉన్నాయి.

title: Google Announces Nano Banana 2 Lite-Powered Short Video Overviews for NotebookLM
description: The feature builds upon the previous release of Cinematic Video Overviews
content: Google on Tuesday announced Short Video Overviews for NotebookLM, its AI-powered research assistant and knowledge base builder. The feature, as the name suggests, allows users to generate concise videos leveraging AI. The Mountain View-based tech giant says it can summarise uploaded sources in a minute using narrative explanations and educational animations. The feature builds upon Google’s steady transformation of NotebookLM from a simple AI-powered research assistant into a more versatile learning tool in recent months.

title: Used Renault Clio Renaultsport 2013-2016 review
description:
New Renaultsport hot hatch has sophistication, but can it excite when direct rivals like the Ford Fiesta ST have perfected the formula?

Few cars have reigned as class leader for as long as the Renault Clio Renaultsport.Every previous iteration of it has been our hot supermini of choice for a simple reason: each was an enthusiast’s dream.Fast, light, cheap and adjustable, with a heady 2.0-litre naturally aspirated engine and twangy Cup chassis, past versions positively clamoured to be driven hard and devoured track duties just as readily as they spiced up a commute.To anyone lucky enough to have spent a decade and a half behind its oversized steering wheel, the Renaultsport Renault Clio was a formula of devilish perfection. But apparently not one immune to change.With an all-new Renault Clio comes a seismic change to Renaultsport’s established approach. Like the standard model, the RS 200 must now be bought with five doors. Its engine has been downsized and turbocharged. And the gearbox has been automated. Although a more track-focussed RS 220 Trophy has recently been added.These changes are intended to make the former tearaway a more appealing prospect to a broader cross-section of buyers.But can a softer, more sensible Clio RS live up to our lofty expectations?

title: దేశంలో నిత్యావసరాల ధరల మరింత పెరగనున్నాయా..?
description: El Nino Effect : దేశంలో పసిడి ధరలు తగ్గు ముఖం పడుతున్నా, సామాన్యుడి వంటగది బడ్జెట్ మాత్రం మరింత భారంగా మారే సూచనలు కనిపిస్తున్నాయి. అంతర్జాతీయంగా...
content:
El Nino Effect : దేశంలో పసిడి ధరలు తగ్గు ముఖం పడుతున్నా, సామాన్యుడి వంటగది బడ్జెట్ మాత్రం మరింత భారంగా మారే సూచనలు కనిపిస్తున్నాయి. అంతర్జాతీయంగా బలపడుతున్న ‘ఎల్నినో’ (El Nino – పసిఫిక్ మహాసముద్రంలో ఉపరితల ఉష్ణోగ్రతలు పెరగడం వల్ల రుతుపవనాలు బలహీనపడే ప్రక్రియ) ప్రభావం కారణంగా ఈ ఏడాది దేశంలో వర్షపాతం గణనీయంగా తగ్గుతుందనే అంచనాలు వెలువడుతున్నాయి. ఈ లోటు వర్షపాత అంచనాల నేపథ్యంలో, రానున్న రోజుల్లో పప్పుధాన్యాలు, కూరగాయలు, వంట నూనెలు వంటి నిత్యావసర వస్తువుల ధరలు విపరీతంగా పెరగొచ్చని మార్కెట్ విశ్లేషకులు హెచ్చరిస్తున్నారు. ఇప్పటికే అంతర్జాతీయ యుద్ధ వాతావరణం, భౌగోళిక రాజకీయ ఉద్రిక్తతల వల్ల దేశంలో గ్యాస్, పెట్రోల్, డీజిల్ ధరలు పెరిగి సామాన్య, మధ్యతరగతి ప్రజలు ఇబ్బందులు పడుతుండగా.. ఇప్పుడు ఎల్నినో రూపంలో మరో కొత్త సంక్షోభం ముంచుకొస్తోంది.



Read Also : తమిళనాడు సీఎం విజయ్ మరో కీలక నిర్ణయం











జులైలో పెరగనున్న పాల ధరలు.. డైరీ రంగంపై పశుగ్రాసం కొరత ప్రభావం!



వర్షాలు సకాలంలో పడకపోతే ఆ ప్రభావం నేరుగా పశుగ్రాసం లభ్యతపై పడి, డైరీ రంగం తీవ్రంగా నష్టపోయే ప్రమాదం ఉంది. దీనిపై పరాగ్ మిల్క్ ఫుడ్స్ ఛైర్మన్ దేవేంద్ర షా మాట్లాడుతూ.. దేశంలో పశుగ్రాసం కొరత భయాల వల్ల పాల ధరలు ఇప్పటికే 2 నుంచి 3 శాతం మేర పెరిగాయని గుర్తు చేశారు. ఒకవేళ జులై నెలలో కూడా ఇదే విధమైన లోటు వర్షపాతం కొనసాగితే, పాలకు డిమాండ్ పెరిగి ధరలు మరో 3 నుంచి 4 శాతం వరకు అదనంగా పెరిగే అవకాశం ఉందని ఆయన స్పష్టం చేశారు. పాలు, పాల ఉత్పత్తుల ధరలు పెరిగితే అది ద్రవ్యోల్బణానికి దారితీసి హోటల్ నిర్వహణ, నిత్యం వాడే కాఫీ, టీల నుంచి పసిపిల్లల ఆహారం వరకు అన్నింటిపై ప్రభావం చూపుతుంది. వర్షాలు ఆశాజనకంగా పడకపోతే రానున్న పండుగల సీజన్ నాటికి సామాన్యుడి జేబుకు మరిన్ని చిల్లులు పడటం ఖాయంగా కనిపిస్తోంది.

title: ‘You can expect prices to be high and stay high’: Domestic airfare is skyrocketing faster than international flight costs, despite using less jet fuel
description: Jet fuel costs doubled over the course of the Iran war, but other factors are behind the rising domestic travel costs.
content:
A summer travel paradox has emerged: Even though international flights use considerably more jet fuel than domestic travel, the cost to fly within the U.S. has skyrocketed at rates far beyond that of flying abroad.



According to data from airfare search engine Skiplagged, domestic flight price growth has increased 23.2% from March 2025 to this month, while international flight costs have increased 11.5% in the same time period. This summer marks the highest domestic passenger prices for the season since 2022.



Compared to international flights, which consume 15,000 to 30,000 gallons of fuel—about 1,500 to 3,000 per hour as a result of larger aircraft and long-haul routes—domestic flights use about 1,800 to 2,7000 gallons per trip, or about 750 to 900 gallons per hour.



Jet fuel costs nearly doubled during the Iran war, with supplies dwindling in some parts of the world as a result of halted traffic at the Strait of Hormuz, the choke point through which 20% of global oil usually flows. Rising fuel costs caused panic in the airline industry: Willie Walsh, the outgoing director general of the International Air Transport Association (IATA), warned this month the global airline industry’s profits would be cut in half as a result of tepid demand, culminating in the worst financial year for aviation since the pandemic.



The anxieties, however, did not meaningfully materialize. Instead, the rising airfare costs indicate high demand for summer travel, combined with airlines successfully making a series of moves that effectively protected them from supply-chain uncertainty from the war, such as leaning into premiumization and slashing certain routes. 



“It’s kind of a glass half full kind of scenario, where I think the outcome was not as bad as many predicted,” Christopher Anderson, a Cornell University professor of services management who studies the airline industry, told Fortune. “Because it wasn’t as bad, and the capacity is not there…we’re seeing elevated prices.”



The resilience is good news for the airline industry—but the pattern of increased prices ahead of a busy summer travel season also exposes the large portion of the American population that is now facing high travel costs, even to fly within the country. It’s yet another example of the K-shaped economy in action, where the wealthy can splurge on expensive airfare while most other households weigh tough travel decisions.



“Here in the U.S., we have a very bifurcated economy,” Anderson said. “And a lot of this turmoil that we’re seeing is the effects more on one segment of that economy than the other.”



What’s behind the domestic travel cost paradox?



Unlike increased road travel costs, which Americans experience in real time when they refuel their cars, air travel is only partially determined by the cost of jet fuel. Airline customers may be paying higher prices because of elevated fuel costs now, despite their travel being weeks or months in the future. Moreover, airlines are constantly managing routes and prices to respond to competitors. Part of this is a result of the Iran war. American Airlines announced this month it would suspend six “select routes” within the U.S. during August and September amid higher fuel costs, but part of it is the cost of doing business.



“I would absolutely say we’ve seen a dramatic increase in fuel prices, but without a doubt the entirety of that fuel cost has not been passed on to consumers,” Anderson said. “There’s obviously a correlation between airfares and fuel prices, but it’s not as strong as one might think.”



While some fare increases can be explained with higher costs, Anderson argued much of it can be explained by decisions airlines like American have made to cut capacity and focus on profits. However, resilient summer travel has meant higher demand for fewer flights, enabling airlines to keep prices higher. American Airlines expects similar profits this year as in 2025, when fuel prices were much lower.



“People still want to travel, and travel is still a bargain,” American CEO Robert Isom told Bloomberg TV last month.



After Spirit Airlines ended operations earlier this year, carriers saw an influx in the budget airline’s customers, further incentivizing them to keep fares higher, but airlines aren’t just getting more customers from budget airlines. The premiumization of the flying experience encourages travelers to upgrade their experiences. And not only are premium seats more expensive than regular economy tickets, but they tend to increase in price more than their more affordable alternatives.



“[Airlines] have a lot more pricing power, and so they definitely do recover those higher fuel prices in some of the more non-entry-level cabin assortments,” Anderson said.



Conversely, international travel costs have increased more modestly over this time because there hasn’t been the same changes in demand. There are often fewer international flights to begin with, meaning airlines don’t need to make as many changes to capacity in order to have full flights.



What can consumers expect of air travel costs?



Even with the Strait of Hormuz reopening and oil prices falling, airfare is expected to remain sky-high. Jet fuel is hovering around $2.87 per gallon, down from an April high of nearly $5, but according to Deutsche Bank Securities, airlines raised prices as recently as two weeks ago.



Part of the persistently high airfare is due to sustained demand, but part of it is also that it takes airlines time to add capacity back, Anderson said. Still, he doesn’t expect ticket costs to be lower in a few months for Americans who delayed making travel plans, banking on cheaper prices. There’s a chance budget airlines like Frontier expand their own capacity in the wake of Spirit Airlines’ exit—but more likely, airfare will move in the same direction as the aircraft: up.



“As someone looking for air travel, you can expect prices to be high and stay high for the near term,” Anderson said. “It’s not like air travel is going to get insanely inexpensive anytime soon.”
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

IVAC marks major global wellness milestone with guests from 65+ countries
description: Indus Valley Ayurvedic Centre (IVAC), one of India’s most recognised Ayurvedic healing institutions, today announced a significant operational milestone: more than 50,000 guests have now completed therapeutic programmes at its Mysuru campus, with visitors recorded from over 65 countries across six continents. The centre also reports a guest satisfaction rating of 4.8 out of 5, based on independently verified reviews.The milestone positions IVAC among a small group of Ayurvedic institutions worldwide to have delivered physician-supervised classical treatments at this scale, and coincides with a broader shift in global wellness travel, from short-stay relaxation to structured, evidence-informed healing programmes.Milestone at a Glance50,000+ guests have completed healing programmes since the centre’s foundingGuests from 65+ countries, across Europe, the Americas, Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, and Africa8,000+ guests who have returned for repeat programmes, a metric the centre considers its core measure of outcome quality4.8 / 5 average satisfaction rating across independently submitted guest reviews25+ years of continuous physician-supervised Ayurvedic practice under a single founding medical director“This milestone is not simply a number. It is 50,000 individual decisions by people around the world to invest in their health through classical Ayurveda. Each guest arrived with a specific condition, a specific goal, or a specific need for restoration. That trust is what drives us to maintain the clinical rigour and personalisation that Ayurveda demands.”- Dr. Talavane Krishna, Founder and Medical Director, IVACWhy the Milestone Matters: A Shifting Global MarketThe timing of the announcement reflects a structural change in the global wellness industry. The Global Wellness Institute estimates the wellness economy at over USD 5.6 trillion, with wellness tourism emerging as one of its fastest-growing segments. Travellers are increasingly choosing destinations based on the clinical credibility and long-term health outcomes they offer, not merely the luxury of the experience.India, as the country of Ayurveda’s origin, holds a structural advantage in this environment. However, industry observers note that the advantage is only realised by institutions that deliver Ayurveda in its classical, physician-supervised form, a distinction that separates outcomes-focused centres from the broader ‘wellness retreat’ category.IVAC’s guest data, particularly the high proportion of guests from outside India and the volume of repeat visitors, is cited by the centre as evidence that physician-led classical Ayurveda commands an audience that purely spa-oriented offerings cannot easily replicate.About IVAC’s Clinical ModelFounded by Dr. Talavane Krishna, a qualified allopathic physician and anaesthesiologist who retrained in classical Ayurveda, IVAC operates on the principle that Ayurveda is most effective when delivered as a structured healing system rather than an experiential product. The centre’s approach begins with a detailed individual assessment, evaluating prakriti (constitutional type), current imbalances, and health history, before any therapy is prescribed.Panchakarma, the centre’s signature offering, is administered under the direct supervision of qualified Ayurvedic physicians and follows classical preparatory, treatment, and recovery protocols. The centre’s therapist training programme is conducted in-house to maintain consistency of technique and depth of knowledge across the guest experience.Located in Mysuru, Karnataka, a city with deep historical associations with yoga, Ayurveda, and traditional learning, IVAC benefits from a cultural environment in which Ayurvedic practice has existed continuously for centuries. The centre treats this context as a material part of the healing environment it offers guests.“Reaching 50,000 guests from over 65 countries is a meaningful data point for us, but the number we watch most closely is returning guests. More than 8,000 people have come back. In a category where the quality of outcomes is everything, repeat visits are the most honest signal we have.”-IVAC Guest Relations, Indus Valley Ayurvedic CentreWhat This Milestone Signals for Wellness Tourism in IndiaIVAC’s achievement is indicative of a broader opportunity for Karnataka and India. Mysuru, positioned as a hub for traditional knowledge systems and increasingly recognised on international wellness itineraries, is one of a small number of Indian cities with the cultural infrastructure, trained practitioner base, and institutional legacy to anchor a credible global wellness tourism brand.As interest in preventive health Ayurveda, chronic stress management, and non-pharmaceutical therapeutic approaches continues to grow internationally, authentic Ayurveda, delivered by institutions with the clinical depth and track record that IVAC represents , is well placed to serve a market that is both large and increasingly discerning.About Indus Valley Ayurvedic Centre (IVAC)Indus Valley Ayurvedic Centre is a physician-founded, physician-supervised Ayurvedic healing institution based in Mysuru, Karnataka, India. Established over 25 years ago by Dr. Talavane Krishna, IVAC specialises in classical Panchakarma therapy, personalised Ayurvedic treatment programmes, and preventive healthcare through authentic Vedic protocols. The centre has hosted more than 50,000 guests from over 65 countries and holds a 4.8-star guest satisfaction rating.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.
